seo.description: Review your Davinto cart before checkout.

label: Selected pieces
title: Your Cart
description: Review the color, size, and quantity of every piece before moving to delivery and payment.
emptyDescription: Start with the current collection, choose a color and size, and your selected pieces will wait here.
clearConfirmMessage: This will remove all items from your cart.
secureNote: Offers, bundles, discount codes, and delivery fees are recalculated securely during checkout.
